requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection — G98/G99 for Bidirectional (V2G/V2H) Export
requirement_topic.zh: 并网要求 — 双向（V2G/V2H）出口适用 G98/G99
requirement_topic.zht: 並網要求 — 雙向（V2G/V2H）出口適用 G98/G99

summary.en: In the UK, EV chargers that export electricity to the grid (V2G/V2H bidirectional operation) are treated as generating units and must comply with ENA Engineering Recommendation G98 (micro-generators up to 16 A per phase, LV connection) or G99 (larger generators or where G98 type-test is not available). Requirements include type-testing to the relevant G98/G99 schedule, anti-islanding protection, loss-of-mains (LoM) protection, and registration/notification with the Distribution Network Operator (DNO) before commissioning. Purely unidirectional chargers that only draw power from the grid are treated as loads and are not subject to G98/G99. G99 Issue 2 (published March 2025) introduces dedicated requirements for V2G and electrical storage systems, effective 1 March 2026.
summary.zh: 在英国，向电网出口电力的电动汽车充电器（V2G/V2H双向运行）被视为发电装置，须符合ENA工程建议G98（单相电流不超过16 A的微型发电机，低压接入）或G99（较大发电机或无G98型式试验的情形）。要求包括：按相关G98/G99附表进行型式试验、防孤岛保护、失压检测（LoM）保护，以及在调试前向配电网运营商（DNO）注册/通知。仅从电网取电的单向充电器被视为负载，无需满足G98/G99要求。 G99第2版（2025年3月发布）引入针对V2G及储能系统的专项要求，自2026年3月1日起生效。
summary.zht: 在英國，向電網出口電力的電動汽車充電器（V2G/V2H雙向運行）被視為發電裝置，須符合ENA工程建議G98（單相電流不超過16 A的微型發電機，低壓接入）或G99（較大發電機或無G98型式試驗的情形）。要求包括：按相關G98/G99附表進行型式試驗、防孤島保護、失壓檢測（LoM）保護，以及在調試前向配電網運營商（DNO）登記/通知。僅從電網取電的單向充電器被視為負載，無需滿足G98/G99要求。 G99第2版（2025年3月發布）引入針對V2G及儲能系統的專項要求，自2026年3月1日起生效。

standards_or_laws: ENA Engineering Recommendation G98 Issue 2 (10 March 2025) — supersedes G98 Issue 1 Amendment 7 (2024); effective 1 March 2026 for new V2G/storage requirements
ENA Engineering Recommendation G99 Issue 2 (10 March 2025) — supersedes G99 Issue 1 Amendment 10 (2024); introduces dedicated V2G/electrical storage requirements, effective 1 March 2026
BS EN 62116:2014 (anti-islanding test method referenced by G98/G99)

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent mandatory standard for V2G grid-export by EV chargers at the same level of specificity as G98/G99. The primary communication protocol between charger and vehicle BMS is GB/T 27930 (CAN-bus based DC fast charging communication), which governs charger-to-vehicle signalling but does not address grid-export protection or anti-islanding requirements. GB/T 33593-2017 (Technical requirements for grid connection of distributed resources) is a recommended standard (GB/T prefix = recommended, not mandatory) covering 35 kV and below distributed generation including energy storage; it does not specifically address V2G EV export scenarios. NB/T 33015-2014 (superseded by NB/T 33015-2025) covered electrochemical energy storage grid connection acceptance — it is not an EV-charger-specific grid-export standard. The V2G regulatory framework in China remains under development. GB/T 27930 is not compatible with the UK/European Combined Charging System (CCS) or CHAdeMO V2G protocols.
summary.zh: 中国目前没有与G98/G99同等具体程度的强制性V2G并网出口标准。充电桩与车辆BMS之间的主要通信协议为GB/T 27930（基于CAN总线的直流快充通信），该标准规范充电桩与车辆间的信号交互，但不涉及并网出口保护或防孤岛要求。GB/T 33593-2017（分布式资源并网技术要求）是推荐性标准（GB/T前缀 = 推荐，非强制），适用于35千伏及以下分布式发电（含储能），不专门涉及V2G电动汽车出口场景。NB/T 33015-2014（已被NB/T 33015-2025取代）涵盖电化学储能并网验收，并非专门针对电动汽车充电桩的并网出口标准。中国V2G监管框架仍在发展中。GB/T 27930与英国/欧洲联合充电系统（CCS）或CHAdeMO V2G协议不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國目前沒有與G98/G99同等具體程度的強制性V2G並網出口標準。充電樁與車輛BMS之間的主要通信協議為GB/T 27930（基於CAN匯流排的直流快充通信），該標準規範充電樁與車輛間的訊號交互，但不涉及並網出口保護或防孤島要求。GB/T 33593-2017（分佈式資源並網技術要求）是推薦性標準（GB/T前綴 = 推薦，非強制），適用於35千伏及以下分佈式發電（含儲能），不專門涉及V2G電動汽車出口場景。NB/T 33015-2014（已被NB/T 33015-2025取代）涵蓋電化學儲能並網驗收，並非專門針對電動汽車充電樁的並網出口標準。中國V2G監管框架仍在發展中。GB/T 27930與英國/歐洲聯合充電系統（CCS）或CHAdeMO V2G協議不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2015 (DC charger-BMS communication protocol, updated by GB/T 27930-2023)
GB/T 33593-2017 (Technical requirements for grid connection of distributed resources — recommended standard, not specific to V2G EV chargers)
NB/T 33015-2014 (superseded by NB/T 33015-2025; covered electrochemical energy storage grid-connection acceptance — not EV-charger-specific)

gap.en: Significant gap. UK V2G/V2H bidirectional chargers must pass G98 or G99 type-testing and register with the DNO before grid export is permitted — this is a conditional mandatory requirement triggered by export capability. China lacks an equivalent mandatory G98/G99-level framework for V2G export protection; GB/T 33593-2017 is a recommended (not mandatory) distributed-generation standard that does not specifically address V2G EV export scenarios. Additionally, GB/T 27930 (CN charging communication) is technically incompatible with CCS/CHAdeMO V2G protocols used in the UK, creating both a regulatory and hardware interoperability gap. A China-market charger re-certified for UK V2G use must undergo G98/G99 type-testing, adopt a compatible V2G communication protocol, and complete DNO registration. Note: G98 Issue 2 and G99 Issue 2 (both 10 March 2025, effective 1 March 2026) add new requirements for V2G chargers and electrical storage; products targeting the UK V2G market must be assessed against Issue 2.
gap.zh: 差距显著。英国V2G/V2H双向充电桩须通过G98或G99型式试验，并在允许并网出口前向DNO注册——这是由出口功能触发的条件性强制要求。中国缺乏与V2G出口保护相当的强制性G98/G99级别框架；GB/T 33593-2017是推荐性（非强制性）分布式发电标准，不专门针对V2G电动汽车出口场景。此外，GB/T 27930（中国充电通信）与英国使用的CCS/CHAdeMO V2G协议在技术上不兼容，造成监管与硬件互操作性双重差距。面向英国V2G市场重新认证的国产充电桩须通过G98/G99型式试验、采用兼容的V2G通信协议，并完成DNO注册。 注意：G98第2版和G99第2版（均于2025年3月10日发布，自2026年3月1日起生效）专门为V2G充电器及储能系统新增要求；面向英国V2G市场的产品须按第2版要求进行评估。
gap.zht: 差距顯著。英國V2G/V2H雙向充電樁須通過G98或G99型式試驗，並在允許並網出口前向DNO登記——這是由出口功能觸發的條件性強制要求。中國缺乏與V2G出口保護相當的強制性G98/G99級別框架；GB/T 33593-2017是推薦性（非強制性）分佈式發電標準，不專門針對V2G電動汽車出口場景。此外，GB/T 27930（中國充電通信）與英國使用的CCS/CHAdeMO V2G協議在技術上不相容，造成監管與硬件互操作性雙重差距。面向英國V2G市場重新認證的國產充電樁須通過G98/G99型式試驗、採用相容的V2G通信協議，並完成DNO登記。 注意：G98第2版和G99第2版（均於2025年3月10日發布，自2026年3月1日起生效）專門為V2G充電器及儲能系統新增要求；面向英國V2G市場的產品須按第2版要求進行評估。

mandatory_status.target: conditional — mandatory for any charger with grid-export (V2G/V2H) capability; not required for unidirectional load-only chargers
mandatory_status.cn: not directly applicable — no equivalent mandatory V2G grid-export standard; GB/T 27930 mandatory for DC fast charging communication

source.publisher: Energy Networks Association (ENA) via dcode.org.uk (official ENA document host)

compliance_verdict.en: Conditional gap requiring action for V2G products. A bidirectional EV charger designed for the Chinese market will not meet UK G98/G99 grid-export requirements without additional type-testing, anti-islanding compliance, and DNO registration. Unidirectional chargers are unaffected by G98/G99. This verdict is informational only; consult a UK-accredited test laboratory and the relevant DNO for project-specific obligations. G98 Issue 2 and G99 Issue 2 (both effective 1 March 2026) add V2G/storage-specific requirements; V2G products entering the UK market from 1 March 2026 onwards must be assessed against Issue 2 of the relevant recommendation.
compliance_verdict.zh: V2G产品存在条件性合规差距，需采取行动。面向中国市场设计的双向电动汽车充电桩，未经额外型式试验、防孤岛合规验证及DNO注册，将无法满足英国G98/G99并网出口要求。单向充电桩不受G98/G99影响。本结论仅供参考，具体项目义务请咨询英国认可测试实验室及相关DNO。 G98第2版和G99第2版（均自2026年3月1日起生效）新增V2G/储能专项要求；2026年3月1日起进入英国市场的V2G产品须按相关建议第2版评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: V2G產品存在條件性合規差距，需採取行動。面向中國市場設計的雙向電動汽車充電樁，未經額外型式試驗、防孤島合規驗證及DNO登記，將無法滿足英國G98/G99並網出口要求。單向充電樁不受G98/G99影響。本結論僅供參考，具體項目義務請諮詢英國認可測試實驗室及相關DNO。 G98第2版和G99第2版（均自2026年3月1日起生效）新增V2G/儲能專項要求；2026年3月1日起進入英國市場的V2G產品須按相關建議第2版評估。
